sections.paragraph:
Original: קשׁת

Transliteration: qesheth

Phonetic: keh'-sheth

BDB Definition:

  1. bow
    1. bow (for hunting, battle)
    2. bowmen, archers
    3. bow (figuratively of might)
    4. rainbow

Origin: from H7185 in the original sense of H6983 of bending

TWOT entry: 2093

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
